PURCHASED 2014 FORD EXPLORER JULY 20, 2014 - JULY 26,2014 - I WAS PULLING AWAY FROM DRIVE THRU PHARMACY AND MY DASH LIGHTS WENT BLACK.  TOOK MY VEHICLE INTO SERVICE THE NEXT MORNING - THEY COULD NOT FIND ANYTHING WRONG.  MY VEHICLE HAS BEEN BACK 6 MORE TIMES.  ONCE AGAIN FOR LOOS

narrative.headline: What 2014 Ford Explorer owners report most
narrative.summary: Steering complaints dominate owner reports for this Explorer model year, with drivers describing loss of control during evasive maneuvers. Structure and engine issues each account for a meaningful share of complaints, with owners reporting problems ranging from interior components trapping fingers to unexpected vehicle movement at low speed. Suspension complaints, while less frequent, are also associated with crash incidents.

issues.title: Steering
issues.blurb: Owners report that evasive steering maneuvers — such as swerving to avoid another vehicle — resulted in loss of directional control and collision with curbs or other objects, with some incidents involving fires or crashes · 1 fire · 10 crash · 6 injured

issues.title: Structure
issues.blurb: Owners report interior plastic components, including rear cup holders, trapping fingers and requiring force to free them · 2 injured

issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle moving in reverse unexpectedly after being shifted into drive, contrary to the driver's intended direction · 5 injured

issues.blurb: Owners report that during evasive maneuvers the vehicle became uncontrollable and struck curbs, with some incidents resulting in crashes · 8 crash · 3 injured
